source: external review of the M25 optimization plan

review_summary.main_correction: Do not start with micro-profiling alone. First address the two highest-leverage startup suspects: the debug Emscripten WASM build and forced schema invalidation before every deploy.
verified_repo_facts: scripts/typeduck-wasm-build.sh currently builds the wasm32-unknown-emscripten browser artifact under target/wasm32-unknown-emscripten/debug.
The existing M25 reload evidence shows assets loaded in under 100 ms while runtime initialization took about 47 seconds.

plan_change: M25-DOGFOOD-01 Task 2 should run release-WASM and skip-fresh-deploy work before broader startup micro-optimizations, then re-measure and set the warm-reload budget from the optimized baseline.
